overview: Enhance the notification system by adding bell icons to session items in the sidebar and a shaking animation to the toolbar bell. When a session has unread notifications, its sidebar entry shows a shaking bell icon with a breathing glow effect on the row. The toolbar bell also shakes when there are unread notifications. All animations stop when the user switches to that session.
goals: Add a small bell icon to each session item in the sidebar that has unread notifications
Apply a breathing glow (pulsing background) effect to sidebar session items with unread notifications
Apply a shaking/ringing animation to both the sidebar bell icon and the toolbar bell icon when unread notifications exist
Stop all animations for a session when the user switches to it (marks notifications as read)
nonGoals: No changes to the notification detection logic on the server side
No changes to the notification dropdown panel behavior
No per-session notification count badge in sidebar (just bell icon presence + animation)
successMetrics: Sidebar session item shows shaking bell icon within 1 second of receiving an unread notification for that session
Sidebar session item has visible breathing glow effect when it has unread notifications
Toolbar bell icon shakes when any session has unread notifications
All animations for a session stop immediately when user switches to that session
Animations work correctly across all 8 color themes

routes.name: Main App
routes.purpose: Single-page app — modifications to sidebar and toolbar

uiNotes: Sidebar bell icon: small bell character or SVG, placed after session name, only visible when session has unread notifications
Breathing glow: subtle pulsing background-color animation on the session-item row, using CSS @keyframes with theme-aware colors
Bell shake: CSS @keyframes rotation animation (-15deg to +15deg) on both sidebar bell and toolbar bell
Toolbar bell shake: only active when getUnreadCount() > 0
Animations must be smooth (use CSS animations, not JS intervals)
Mobile responsive: animations should not cause layout shifts
rules: A session has unread notifications if notifications array contains any item where sessionId matches and read===false
When user switches to a session (switchSession), all notifications for that session should be marked as read
Toolbar bell shakes when global unread count > 0, stops when unread count reaches 0
Sidebar bell icon + breathing glow appear per-session based on that session's unread notification count
renderSessionList must check unread status per session and apply appropriate CSS classes
CSS animations use @keyframes for shake (transform: rotate) and breathe (background-color opacity pulse)
Breathing glow color should use rgba version of --accent or similar theme variable for cross-theme compatibility
qualityGates: Chrome DevTools automated UI test: bell icon appears in sidebar when notification exists
Chrome DevTools automated UI test: toolbar bell has shake class when unread > 0
Chrome DevTools automated UI test: switching to session removes animations

stories.title: CSS keyframe animations for bell shake and breathing glow
stories.description: As a developer, I want CSS @keyframes animations defined in style.css so that bell icons can shake and session rows can have a breathing glow effect.
acceptanceCriteria: Add @keyframes 'bell-shake' animation: rotates between -15deg, 15deg, -10deg, 10deg, -5deg, 0deg over ~0.6s, repeating
Add @keyframes 'breathe-glow' animation: pulses background-color from transparent to rgba(accent, 0.12) and back over ~2s, repeating
Add CSS class '.bell-shaking' that applies bell-shake animation to any element
Add CSS class '.session-breathing' that applies breathe-glow animation to .session-item elements
Add CSS class '.session-bell-icon' for the small bell icon in sidebar items: font-size, positioning, inline display
Animations are smooth and do not cause layout shifts
Example: element with class 'bell-shaking' visually shakes continuously
Negative case: element without the class has no animation

stories.title: Track unread notifications per session
stories.description: As a developer, I want a helper function to check unread notification count per session so that the UI can decide which sessions need visual indicators.
acceptanceCriteria: Add function getSessionUnreadCount(sessionId) that returns count of notifications where sessionId matches and read===false
Add function hasSessionUnread(sessionId) that returns boolean
Add function markSessionAsRead(sessionId) that marks all notifications for that sessionId as read, then calls updateBellBadge() and renderSessionList()
In switchSession(), call markSessionAsRead(id) so switching to a session clears its unread notifications
Example: session A has 3 unread notifications -> hasSessionUnread(A) returns true, getSessionUnreadCount(A) returns 3
Example: switch to session A -> all 3 notifications marked read, hasSessionUnread(A) returns false
Negative case: session B has 0 unread notifications -> hasSessionUnread(B) returns false

stories.title: Sidebar session items show bell icon and breathing glow
stories.description: As a user, I want to see a shaking bell icon and breathing glow on sidebar session items that have unread notifications so I can quickly identify which sessions need attention.
acceptanceCriteria: In renderSessionList(), for each session check hasSessionUnread(session.id)
If session has unread: add CSS class 'session-breathing' to the session-item div
If session has unread: append a small bell icon span (Unicode bell character) with classes 'session-bell-icon bell-shaking' inside the session-info div, after session-name
If session has no unread: no bell icon, no breathing class
When notifications change (addNotification, markAsRead, clearAll), call renderSessionList() to refresh indicators
Example: session 'claude@project' receives notification -> sidebar row glows and shows shaking bell
Example: user switches to that session -> glow and bell disappear
Negative case: session with aiTool=null and no notifications -> no bell, no glow

stories.title: Toolbar bell icon shaking animation
stories.description: As a user, I want the toolbar bell icon to shake when there are any unread notifications so I have a persistent visual cue.
acceptanceCriteria: In updateBellBadge(), if unread count > 0, add class 'bell-shaking' to #notif-bell-btn
If unread count === 0, remove class 'bell-shaking' from #notif-bell-btn
Animation is continuous while unread > 0
Animation stops immediately when all notifications are read or cleared
Example: 1 unread notification -> toolbar bell shakes
Example: user clicks 'Mark all read' -> toolbar bell stops shaking
Negative case: 0 unread notifications -> no shaking animation on toolbar bell

stories.title: Cross-theme and mobile compatibility testing
stories.description: As a developer, I want automated UI tests via Chrome DevTools to verify the bell and animation features work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: create AI session, trigger notification, verify sidebar session-item has class 'session-breathing'
Test: verify sidebar session-item contains element with class 'session-bell-icon bell-shaking'
Test: verify #notif-bell-btn has class 'bell-shaking' when unread > 0
Test: switch to session with unread, verify 'session-breathing' class is removed from that session's sidebar item
Test: verify #notif-bell-btn 'bell-shaking' class removed when all read
Test: breathing glow uses theme-aware color (rgba of --accent variable)
Example: full flow — notification arrives -> sidebar glows + shakes -> switch to session -> animations stop
Negative case: session with no notifications never receives animation classes
